name: Maoming Petro-Chemical Shihua Co., Ltd
summary: Maoming Petro-Chemical Shihua Co., Ltd manufactures and sells petrochemicals in the People's Republic of China. It offers polypropylene resin powders, secondary butyl acetate, methyl tert-butyl ether, ethanolamine, industrial and light white oil, ethylene, butane, propane, industrial hexane, cyclopentane, carbon, liquefied petroleum gas, and plastic products. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Maoming, the People's Republic of China.
